_meta.description: County-level presidential vote share. Stamped onto listings by scraper/enrichment/voting.py.
notes: Names match scraper/enrichment/voting.py:_normalize_county output: lowercase, county/parish/borough/census area/municipality suffix stripped, dots removed (so 'St. Louis' ↔ 'St Louis' collapse to the same key).
Built from 2024 returns. Refresh annually after the next presidential cycle.
_meta.source: tonmcg/US_County_Level_Election_Results_08-24 (mirror of MIT Election Lab + state SoS returns).
